definitions.usage_example: We need to reduce air pollution.
definitions.usage_example_es: Necesitamos reducir la contaminación del aire.
definitions.usage_context_en: The presence of harmful substances or contaminants in the environment.
definitions.usage_context_es: La presencia de sustancias dañinas o contaminantes en el medio ambiente.

definitions.usage_example: A forest is a complex ecosystem.
definitions.usage_example_es: Un bosque es un ecosistema complejo.
definitions.usage_context_en: A community of living things and their environment.
definitions.usage_context_es: A community of living things and their environment.

definitions.usage_example_es: El parque protege la biodiversidad local.
definitions.usage_context_en: The variety of plant and animal life in a place.
definitions.usage_context_es: The variety of plant and animal life in a place.

definitions.usage_example: Sustainability is central to the policy.
definitions.usage_example_es: La sostenibilidad es central en la política.
definitions.usage_context_en: The ability to continue without harming resources.
definitions.usage_context_es: The ability to continue without harming resources.

definitions.usage_example: The new law limits carbon emission.
definitions.usage_example_es: La nueva ley limita la emisión de carbono.
definitions.usage_context_en: Something released, especially gas or light.
definitions.usage_context_es: Something released, especially gas or light.
